title: Car Tyre Inflator Air Compressor Tyre Pump 12V Electric Car Air Pump for Car Tyres Bike Tyres with Digital Tyre Pressure Gauge and Inflator Valve Adaptors LED Light
features: 【PRESET AUTO SHUT OFF】: You can preset the tyre pressure you want, then the car pump will stop working automatically when the pressure reached the value you preset. So you needn't worry about over-inflating or low tyre pressure problems anymore. The Digital backlit LCD screen with 4 units adjustment( bar, Kpa, psi, kg/c㎡) will help you to check your tire pressure anytime and get rid of the risk of a flat.

【FAST INFLATION】: This electric car compressor uses the original unique turbocharged movement, which is more powerful, less noisy and more stable. It could Inflate the 195/65R15 car tyre from 0 to 35psi in 5min, makes inflating tyres in an emergency faster, easier and more convenient than manual pumps or foot pumps.It comes with a 3000±100mm power cord to connect into the cigarette lighter which fits most small and medium-sized car and SUV.

【STURDY & DURABLE】: We made this car tyre compressor of durable ABS plastic and strong stainless steel turbocharged movement inside. You will feel the decent quality and beautiful shape of our product when you opened the packing box and touched it. It is a great choice to send it as a Christmas or birthday present to your friends, colleague or family.

【3 LED LIGHT MODES】: This car tyre pump equipped with a standard flashlight, flashing red and emergency SOS for easy night use. The red SOS traffic warning light will help a lot in emergent situations; Just start your car, connect it with the car cigarette lighter and press the light switch. Then the red SOS light will work.

【CUSTOMER SERVICE AND NOTES】: WindGallop assures you that we will provide a new replacement or a full refund under your normal use. Notes: 1. Please follow the user manual. 2. Before working, make sure that it is firmly attached to the tyre and the air tube is not bent. 3. Not suitable for the tyres of large trucks, other vehicles with high-pressure tyres and large volumes like Inflatable canoes. 4. When it works for 10 minutes, let it rest for 10 minutes before continuing to use it.
